sources.title: Planning Primitive Notes
sources.snippet: Planfiles turn vague goals into reviewable Markdown with typed YAML execution data.

sources.title: Capability Pack SDK Notes
sources.snippet: Capability Packs expose bounded operations through descriptors, schemas, policy, and approvals.

sources.title: Source Provenance Notes
sources.snippet: Research artifacts should preserve source URLs, retrieval timestamps, extraction warnings, citations, and lineage.
